name: Vivek Krishnakumar
title: Associate Director of Bioinformatics
bio: Directing software test engineering and infrastructure for Illumina's high-throughput platforms. I bridge genomic data complexity with scalable, domain-transferable software engineering rigor.
featuredPublications: The Medicago genome provides insight into the evolution of rhizobial symbioses
Araport11: a complete reannotation of the Arabidopsis thaliana reference genome
JCVI: A versatile toolkit for comparative genomics analysis
